calendar.matters:
Petition For Reformation Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shirley Tam for Laura Mung (Petitioner).

The Court noted that this a petition for reformation of trust under Probate Code 15409 with consents of the beneficiaries, but request a finding of changed circumstances, spoke of changes to the tax laws and stated that changes to the Trust could have been made while the Trustor was still alive. Ms. Tam stated that the purpose of the Trust for Ms. Mung and her Spouse was to make everything easy for her and her Children, that they received improper information as to what the consequences were to her and her spouse, and that it is not meeting the material purpose the creators envisioned. Ms. Tam also stated that the spend thrift clause was a bolier plate provision and that they were not even aware that it was there. The Petition for Reformation of Trust is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Reformation Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-17-2018 Continued To Feb-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Reformation Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-21-2017 Continued To Jan-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Reformation Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Continued To Jan-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shirley Tam for Laura Mung (Petitioner).

The Court stated that this petition is premised on 16403, but there is a spendthrift clause that takes away the Court's discretion to terminate. Ms. Tam stated that she filed a supplemental petition under Probate Code 15409 which provides changed circumstances, that it is fully supported by the Surviving Spouse and the Children, and that she filed a declaration regarding clerical error regarding date of signing of the Trust. The Petition for Reformation of Trust is continued to January 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
